message:
feat(replay): pane merge resolver for deterministic multi-pane replay (ft-og6q6.3.2)

K-way merge of N per-pane event streams using BinaryHeap<Reverse<RecorderMergeKey>>
with clock anomaly detection, gap marker handling, and 27+18=45 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
